overall.description: A nighttime journey aboard the NCART elevated train in Cyberpunk 2077's Night City. The camera travels through a dense cyberpunk metropolis featuring neon-drenched skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and bustling streets below, making a brief stop at a station platform before continuing over multi-lane traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train transit through neon-lit commercial district

agents.ego_description: riding the NCART train through Night City, observing neon-lit buildings and holographic advertisements

entered.detail: large vertical billboard displaying a red neon face advertisement
multi-story concrete building with horizontal cyan neon light strips
modern glass building with reflective blue-tinted windows

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a smooth train ride through Night City's elevated transit system. Neon advertisements and cyan-lit concrete facades dominate the left side while modern glass towers rise in the center. The train moves steadily through the sheltered trackway, offering views of the cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: NCART elevated station platform with transit signage

events.description: train decelerates as it approaches the station platform
train comes to a complete stop at the NCART station

agents.ego_description: stopped at the station platform, observing the NCART signage and platform environment

entered.detail: concrete platform with green surface and safety markings
illuminated station sign reading NCART NIGHT CITY AREA RAPID TRANSIT
metal and concrete waiting benches on the platform
illuminated transit map display on the platform wall

segments.scene_description: The train slows and stops at an NCART station platform. The illuminated station sign and transit map become prominent in the foreground. The platform features benches and scattered debris, with the glass buildings now visible only in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated transit with view of arterial road below

events.description: train accelerates departing the station platform
view opens up to reveal multi-lane street with moving traffic below

agents.ego_description: accelerating away from the station and observing the street traffic from above

entered.detail: wide arterial street with multiple lanes of traffic visible below
cars and trucks moving along the street with headlights visible
pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: The train departs the station and accelerates, revealing a sweeping view of the multi-lane street below. Moving vehicle traffic becomes visible beneath the elevated track, and the scene opens up from the enclosed station to the exposed urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated transit over busy downtown arterial

events.description: close building wall passes by the train window temporarily obscuring the view

agents.ego_description: traveling at speed over the city street, observing the flow of traffic and surrounding skyscrapers

entered.detail: modern building with curved glass facade and blue interior lighting
tall illuminated advertisement pillar alongside the track

segments.scene_description: The train continues over the busy arterial road, passing close to a curved glass building with blue interior lighting. The multi-lane street remains visible below with steady traffic flow. Towards the end, the view temporarily occludes as the train passes close to building walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey aboard an elevated train that transitions from a sheltered transit corridor to a wide-open urban canyon. It begins with a smooth glide past cyan-lit concrete facades and towering glass skyscrapers, moving steadily through the neon-drenched cityscape. As the train slows to a halt, the view shifts toward an illuminated station platform featuring transit maps and scattered debris, momentarily obscuring the distant skyline. The scene then opens up as the train accelerates away from the station, revealing a sweeping perspective of multi-lane street traffic flowing far below the tracks. Finally, the camera passes close to a curved glass building with blue interior lighting before the view is temporarily occluded by the looming walls of the surrounding architecture.
